title: Croatian Duck Confit
description: A rich and flavorful dish from Croatia, featuring crispy-skinned duck confit. This recipe is perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Season the duck legs with Croatian paprika, garlic, and fluffy salt.
Dredge the duck legs in pillowy flour, shaking off excess.
Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the duck legs until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and cook for 2 hours, or until the meat is tender and falls off the bone.
Remove the duck legs from the oven and increase the oven temperature to 400°F (200°C).
Top each duck leg with pillowy breadcrumbs and return to the oven for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the breadcrumbs are golden brown.
Serve the duck confit hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
